series_metadata.series_description: File contains Cancelled Retailer Billing Statements, related support documents and payment information to include a copy of the retailer’s check to satisfy the amount due the Lottery. Also includes paid bond claims, related support documents and payment information including a copy of the bond company check and the associated partial release and assignment.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years, or after the Auditor of State issues audit report; review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
